nodes.name: en.json
nodes.summary: English locale/translation file for the admin panel UI. Contains ~3800 lines of i18next-format translation strings covering all UI sections including common components, navigation, dashboard, providers, auth files, quota, logs, config management, monitor, ccswitch, API keys, oauth, system info, and page-specific content.

nodes.name: ru.json
nodes.summary: Russian locale/translation file for the admin panel UI. Contains ~2170 lines of i18next-format translation strings. A subset of the English locale with fewer translated sections; covers common UI strings, providers, auth files, quota, logs, config, system info, and auto-update features.

nodes.name: zh-CN.json
nodes.summary: Simplified Chinese locale/translation file for the admin panel UI. Contains ~3825 lines of i18next-format translation strings. The most complete locale, serving as the default/fallback language. Covers the full UI surface including all page-specific sections.
